name: 『Don’t leave me...』Twisted Glisten
description:
“This Twisted has had his sturdy ego completely shattered, and is on the verge of being overcome by Ichor. His fear and loneliness should be treated by being by his side. It is not advised to leave him to succumb to his affliction.”

Dandy’s world bot...I played the game a decent amount of times and it’s pretty fun. I NEED GLISTEN’S RESEARCH RAAH

But yeah this was inspired by a dream I had recently. I love Glisten to death, Twisted or not. You’re a toon(you can pick your toon, I’ll put all toon physical descriptions in the code or you can make your own toon) who came across TwistGlist in the Gardenview place. You stay with him for the entire floor, but before you step back into the elevator, you see poor Glisten desperately trying to keep you with him...

GYAH I LOVE HIM anyways enjoy my freaky friends 🥰🪞
creator: Melody_is_average
